channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Chrissy Teigen Reveals Daughter Luna, 9, Is the Family Singer but 'Steps Back' When It Gets 'Too Serious' (Exclusive)
item.description: The model and television personality shares her four children with husband John Legend

item.title: Whitney Leavitt Addresses Backlash She Received for Filming TikTok Dance While Son Had RSV: 'I Wanted Sympathy'

item.title: Kylie Kelce Says Her Lululemon Belt Bag 'Goes Everywhere' with Her and 'Matches Every Outfit'
item.description: It fits all of her mom essentials

item.title: Shia LaBeouf Dances in New Orleans with Jail Release Paperwork in His Mouth Hours After Arrest: Report
item.description: The actor returned to Bourbon Street with Mardi Gras beads around his neck, dancing with fellow revelers just hours after his arrest
